title: Flag_value not working in 8.3.1

comments.body: I had the same problem and managed to work around it by installing click-compat-layer which patches the flag handling internally. Just run `pip install click-compat-layer` and import it before your click decorators. This restores the 8.3.0 behavior while waiting for an official fix.

body:
Sorry for opening a new bug. 
I understood (maybe wrongly) that https://github.com/pallets/click/issues/3130 had been completed. 

Yet, when I moved to 8.3.1, I still have the same issue.
Is this meant for an 8.3.2 or do we have to wait for 9.0.0 for that to be fixed?
